seo.title: Nihao Negocios · China without guesswork
seo.description: We help companies and entrepreneurs import, validate factories, and attend trade fairs in China—with clear guidance, controlled costs, and fewer avoidable risks.
seo.ogDescription: We help companies and entrepreneurs import, validate factories, and attend trade fairs in China.
seo.twitterDescription: Your partner for sourcing, factory audits, trade fairs, and doing business in China — without the improvisation.

hero.headline0: You've been dreaming of importing from China.
hero.subtitle: We help companies and entrepreneurs import from China, vet factories, and navigate trade fairs with confidence: no getting lost, no overpaying, no risks you didn't have to take.

lead.intro: Tell us what you're looking for. The first call is free, with no strings attached — just to see if we can help.

services.title: Judgment, language, and real presence on the ground.

contact.title: The first step is telling us what you need.
contact.sub: No obligation—just a conversation on WhatsApp.

brand.tagline: We speak Chinese. We've been there. China made easy.
brand.name: Nihao Negocios

about.headline: We speak your language—and theirs.
about.intro: Three professionals, one shared passion for China and international trade. Different areas of expertise, one goal: helping you make better decisions before, during, and after every deal.
about.introSecond: We speak Spanish, Mandarin Chinese, English, and Italian—and we understand how negotiations work, what is left unsaid, and how to navigate an ecosystem that can otherwise feel opaque.

martina.title: CHINA & INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS
martina.text: Nine years studying Mandarin Chinese. She lived in Shanghai and accompanies clients on business trips across China. She understands the language, the culture, the supplier landscape, and how to operate effectively on the ground.

gianella.title: LOGISTICS & OPERATIONS
gianella.text: Degree in International Trade. She coordinates projects, processes, and business relationships to support companies in doing business with China.

sofia.title: FINANCE, MANAGEMENT & DATA
sofia.text: She turns numbers into clear decisions. Before moving forward, you know exactly what it will cost to bring the goods all the way to your door.

bridge.headline: A strategic bridge between the world and China.

page.headline: What we do
page.intro: You're not buying a standard package. You're getting judgment, language fluency, and boots on the ground — the things a generic sourcing agent can't offer.

canton.title: Canton Fair Business Trips
canton.headline: You dream of importing. We take you to the Fair.
canton.text: The Canton Fair is the world's largest supplier trade fair: hundreds of thousands of visitors, thousands of exhibitors, and no way to cover it all on your own. We handle it before, during, and after the trip: a focused agenda, real meetings, negotiations in Chinese, and a clear plan of action for when you land back home.

audit.title: Audits & Pre-Shipment Inspections
audit.text: We audit factories to confirm they're legitimate, have the production capacity they claim, and can actually deliver what was agreed… not just what looks good in a catalog. We also inspect your cargo before it leaves port: quality, quantity, packaging, and container condition, so what arrives is exactly what you ordered.

academy.headline: An immersive program that changes how you do business in China, for good.
academy.text: An international immersion program built around business, innovation, Chinese culture, and real-world experiences. We visit trade fairs, companies, and strategic locations to turn theory into practical knowledge and new professional opportunities.
academy.cardText: An experience in China that changes how you see business.

sourcing.title: Supplier sourcing
sourcing.text: We vet manufacturers on pricing, MOQ, and track record so you don't have to guess.

eyes.title: Your eyes on the ground in China
eyes.text: Can't travel? We go for you and report back like you were there.

samples.title: Sample assessment
samples.text: We check the samples before you commit to a full order.

bridge.title: Cultural bridge
bridge.text: Meetings, fairs, negotiations without lost-in-translation moments.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.longText: Our pre-trip preparation method covers culture, international trade, and how to navigate both the Fair and China. We give you the essential knowledge you need before negotiating and travelling.

hero.headline: Go to China. Come back thinking differently about business.
hero.intro: An international immersion program built around business, innovation, and Chinese culture, not lectures. You'll walk trade show floors, tour real companies, and turn what you learn into contacts and opportunities you can actually use.

contact.headline: Let's talk about your next move in China.
contact.intro: Tell us what you're planning: importing, sourcing, a trip to the Fair, whatever stage you're at. No forms, no obligation. Just a real conversation on WhatsApp.
contact.sub: No obligation—just a conversation on WhatsApp.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Don't see your question here? Message us. We usually reply within a few hours.
faq.q1: Do I need previous experience to import from China?
faq.a1: No. Whether it's your first time or your fifth, we adjust the process to your pace and experience level.
faq.q2: I don't know exactly what I want to import yet… Can you still help me find a supplier?
faq.a2: Yes. We start by understanding your project, budget, and goals, then narrow down the options that actually make business sense.
faq.q3: What if I can't travel to China myself?
faq.a3: We represent you. We visit fairs, suppliers, and factories on your behalf, and send back full reports with photos, video, and analysis.
faq.q4: Do you carry out factory audits?
faq.a4: Yes. We audit factories and inspect cargo before it ships, so there are no surprises on arrival.
faq.q5: Do I need a visa to travel to China?
faq.a5: It depends on your nationality and current regulations. We help you confirm exactly what you need before you travel.
faq.q6: Do I need to speak any particular language to work with you?
faq.a6: No. We speak Spanish, Mandarin, English, and Italian — you negotiate in whichever language you're most comfortable in.
faq.q7: Do you only work with large companies?
faq.a7: No. We work with entrepreneurs, SMEs, and larger companies alike. Every project is scaled to fit.

testimonials.title: What our past travelers are saying.
testimonials.rigran: The experience was excellent. The organization was flawless, and even with a packed schedule, everything went smoothly. Having payments, connectivity, and all the logistics sorted out ahead of time gave us real peace of mind. Little touches — like having our own Chinese names — helped break the ice and made a great impression on our local contacts. Thanks to that preparation, we could focus on what mattered most: building business opportunities and laying the groundwork for future collaborations in China.
testimonials.magali: Before the trip, we were worried about not knowing how to navigate the Canton Fair, wasting time, or not being able to communicate with suppliers. With Nihao Negocios by our side, the trip turned out to be far simpler than we imagined. We were able to focus on finding opportunities, and we realized that doing business with China is entirely possible when you have the right team behind you.
testimonials.paco: Before traveling I had the normal fear of going to the other side of the world, to a country as different as China. But with Nihao I felt supported from day one, and I was able to focus on enjoying and making the most of the experience. It was a trip that opened my mind, helped me grow enormously, and one I'd choose again without hesitation.
testimonials.celina: We believe the Nihao Negocios team takes their work seriously and handles it responsibly. They asked all the right questions to really understand the market we work in. Their support ahead of the Canton Fair was key to arriving in China with confidence, and they were always ready to help with whatever came up once we were there. We'd recommend them without hesitation.

footer.talkText: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll help you figure out the best path forward.
footer.tagline: We speak Chinese. We know the market on the ground.

login.title: Nihao Assistant Portal
login.intro: An interactive demo showing how the WhatsApp bot supports travellers, organises supplier information, and generates actionable reports.
login.card1Text: Explore simulated WhatsApp conversations with voice notes, photos, business cards, and intelligent responses.
login.card2Text: View a traveller’s personal dashboard with suppliers, products, contacts, timeline, and exports.
login.card3Text: Access the Nihao team’s internal view with active travellers, routes, reports, and overall metrics.

general.brandTagline: Your intelligent companion during business travel in China.
general.helperText: Record suppliers, products, voice messages, photos, and text notes directly from WhatsApp.
general.reportText: Turn your trip activity into an actionable report.
